sections.paragraph:
Original: עמרמי

Transliteration: ‛amrâmı̂y

Phonetic: am-raw-mee'

BDB Definition:

Amramites = see Aram " exalted"
  1. a branch of the Kohathite family of the tribe of Levi and descendants of Amram, the father of Moses

Origin: from H6019

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
